caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking in front of a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic featuring small floral patterns and a decorative beaded neckline, paired with a dark necklace. A small black lavalier microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom-left corner of each frame, a logo consists of a gold circular emblem with the text "NPTEL" printed in white beneath it. As the sequence progresses, the woman gestures with her hands to emphasize her speech; her right hand moves upward and slightly outward, and her left hand follows a similar motion. Her facial expressions shift as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing in a conversational manner. The lighting is consistent throughout, focusing on the subject against the dark backdrop.
